[Bahlika is the modern Bactria or Balkh in the north of
Afghanistan. Gandhara country extended from the Kabul valley
to Tak^asila. Sulikas, otherwise known as Gulikas, were the people
of the north-western part of India. According to the Matsyapurana1
the country of the Gulikas is watered by the river Caksu (Oxus).
Since the author uses both tVaisya, and 'Vanijald, they cannot be
synonyms. The word 'Vaisya5, therefore, means a tribe of non-
Aryan Origin. (See XIV-2I Infra). Since the commentator inter-
prets the word 'Vanij' as Kirata a forest tribe—originally the nasal
might have been of the dental class. The root means to
'destroy^ according to the ^^tfErft. Gf also t1?—•

If Saturn is situated in the star Purvaphalgunl, dealers in
juices or articles having the six kinds of tastes, courtesans, virgins
and the people of Maharastra will suffer; and if he stays in the
star Uttaraphalguni, trouble will befall kings, jaggery, salt, hermits
